conjunction.name: Conjunction
conjunction.description: A conjunction merges two planetary energies into a single, potent force. The planets become inseparable in their expression — amplifying, blending, and intensifying each other. This is one of the most powerful aspects in the chart.

sextile.name: Sextile
sextile.description: A sextile creates a channel of easy communication between two planets. It represents talent and opportunity — gifts that come naturally but still require action to activate. This aspect says: the door is open.

square.name: Square
square.description: A square creates friction between two planetary energies. This tension demands action — it cannot be ignored. Squares represent the challenges that force the most growth, the obstacles that, overcome, become your greatest strengths.

trine.name: Trine
trine.description: A trine is pure harmony between two planets sharing the same element. Energy flows effortlessly — these are your natural talents, the areas where things seem to just work. The trine is a deep reservoir of strength.

opposition.name: Opposition
opposition.description: An opposition places two planetary energies in direct tension across the chart axis. You are pulled between two equally compelling forces. The work is integration — finding the middle path that honors both without being ruled by either.
